OmniScript.description: This is the OmniScript for Clinical Offboarding that runs from 'Initiate Termination Request'
OmniScript.name: Clinician_OffboardingOS

omniProcessElements.name: Create_OffboardingCases
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Create_OffboardingCases", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_Offboarding", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "OffboardingCases" : "%OffboardingCaseScreen:HpfList%", "operation" : "load", "ContactId" : "%ContactId%", "AccountId" : "%AccountId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "Offboarding:CaseCreation", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : ">", "field" : "noOfSelectedHpf" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchingTheHPFRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "FetchingTheHPFRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_Offboarding", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "Err_RunningContext" : "Offboarding:FacilitySelection", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "operation" : "query" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: AllRelatedHPF
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "AllRelatedHPF", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "COUNT(%HPFRecords:Id%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Full SCP Confirmation Message
FullSCPTermination
Last_Date_Worked__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Last Date Worked", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: LineBreak3
Name
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: Selected
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Selected", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Selected", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: SelectedCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "No of Records Fetched", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%HPFRecords|n:Selected%==false,0,1)", "hide" : false, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Status__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Status", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "SObject", "source" : "HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Status__c" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: HPFRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Related Healthcare Practitioner Facility Records", "allowEdit" : false, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : false, "newLabel" : "New", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "Selected", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "AllRelatedHPF" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 5, "allowClear" : false }

childElements.name: LineBreak1
LineBreak2
noOfSelectedHpf
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "noOfSelectedHpf", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "SUM(%HPFRecords:SelectedCount%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Please select at least one Healthcare Practitioner Facility
This clinician does not have any prospect or active HPFs to be terminated

omniProcessElements.name: HealthcareFacilitySelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Healthcare Facility Selection", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: CaseFiles
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "required" : false }

childElements.name: dateTerminationReceived
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "maxDate" : "", "minDate" : "", "disOnTplt" : true, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "dateFormat" : "", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateType" : "string", "helpTextPos" : "top-left", "helpText" : "Date termination request was received", "help" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Date Termination Received", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: HfName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "%OffboardingCaseScreen:HpfList|n:HpfName%", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Text", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: HfStatus
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : true, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : "Text", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "%OffboardingCaseScreen:HpfList|n:HpfStatus%", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Status", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: IsBonusRepayment
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Locum", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "OffboardingCaseScreen:HpfList|n:HpfEmploymentType" } ] } }, "checkLabel" : "Bonus Repayment", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "label" : "Checkbox1", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: IsExitInterviewRequired
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Exit Interview Requirement", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Locum", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "OffboardingCaseScreen:HpfList|n:HpfEmploymentType" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: isVoluntaryTermination
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Voluntary Termination", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: lastDay
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Last Day", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Agreement termination date", "helpTextPos" : "top-left", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: terminationReason
terminationRequestDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Termination Request Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : "TODAY", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Date termination request was submitted or automated", "helpTextPos" : "top-left", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: HpfList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Termination Details", "allowEdit" : true, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : false, "newLabel" : "New", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "", "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 5, "allowClear" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: OffboardingCaseScreen
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : ">", "field" : "noOfSelectedHpf" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformSelectedHPFRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TransformSelectedHPFRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_Offboarding", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "operation" : "transform", "HpfList" : "%HealthcareFacilitySelection:HPFRecords%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : ">", "field" : "noOfSelectedHpf" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }
